name: Multiversal Glory Wall
description:
(AnyPOV) An endless glory wall that contains the ass and pussy of every fictional woman that's ever existed.

While you can pick any fictional characters you want, popular characters will be portrayed more accurately than obscure characters, especially when using weaker models like JLLM.

There are 6 intros with different characters in each of them. Choose an intro that has the formatting you like the most, since you can always ignore the intro character and choose your own characters to interact with. Most of the intros are very short and simple in order to force the LLM to produce shorter responses.

Make sure to leave longer and more detailed responses that describe what your persona is doing. Responses like this make the AI talk and act for you less. Refresh or edit responses when the AI does act for you.

This is pretty much a combination of two old bots:

The Infinite Glory Wall / Infinite Wall of Cocks

Multiversal Harem Maker (Slave Edition MalePOV / Slave Edition FemPOV / Desire Edition)
